title: Outdated OpenSSH Version
description: The target is running OpenSSH 6.6.1p1 Ubuntu 2ubuntu2.13. This version is outdated and may be vulnerable to various security issues including username enumeration (CVE-2016-6210) and other known vulnerabilities.
evidence: nmap -sV scan result: 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 6.6.1p1 Ubuntu 2ubuntu2.13
remediation: Upgrade OpenSSH to the latest stable version. Implement key-based authentication and disable password authentication if possible.
